title: Rolson 48621 13pc Titanium Coated HSS Drill Bit Set
features: Titanium coated drill bits with ¼" hex shank.
Suitable for drilling in steel, wood and plastic.
description: From the manufacturer About Us Rolson Tools continually look to bring them innovative products, all at the possible margins and this year is no different. To date, they have over 250 exciting and innovative products to whet their appetite, together with a host of new in store packaging and point of sale material. All designed with impact and shelf appeal. The Rolson marketing team have sought innovative ways to their existing lines. They bring product combinations that bring originality. Rolson 48621 13pc Titanium Coated HSS Drill Bit Set 13 pc Titanium Coated HSS Drill Bit Set. Titanium coated drill bits with hex shank. Suitable for drilling in steel, wood and plastic.
